PersonalityTrait.name: Cautious
PersonalityTrait.label: Cautious
PersonalityTrait.description: Prefers to avoid danger and take a careful approach to situations.

PersonalityTrait.name: Brave
PersonalityTrait.label: Brave
PersonalityTrait.description: Faces danger head-on and is willing to take risks.

PersonalityTrait.name: Cowardly
PersonalityTrait.label: Cowardly
PersonalityTrait.description: Avoids conflict and flees from danger whenever possible.

PersonalityTrait.name: Reckless
PersonalityTrait.label: Reckless
PersonalityTrait.description: Acts without thinking of consequences, often endangering self and others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Fearless
PersonalityTrait.label: Fearless
PersonalityTrait.description: Shows no fear even in the most dangerous situations.

PersonalityTrait.name: Timid
PersonalityTrait.label: Timid
PersonalityTrait.description: Easily frightened and hesitant to act.

PersonalityTrait.name: Friendly
PersonalityTrait.label: Friendly
PersonalityTrait.description: Warm and approachable, quick to build rapport with others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Hostile
PersonalityTrait.label: Hostile
PersonalityTrait.description: Quick to anger and often confrontational toward others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Sociable
PersonalityTrait.label: Sociable
PersonalityTrait.description: Enjoys the company of others and seeks out social interaction.

PersonalityTrait.name: Introverted
PersonalityTrait.label: Introverted
PersonalityTrait.description: Prefers solitude and finds large social gatherings draining.

PersonalityTrait.name: Charismatic
PersonalityTrait.label: Charismatic
PersonalityTrait.description: Naturally charming and able to influence others with ease.

PersonalityTrait.name: Aloof
PersonalityTrait.label: Aloof
PersonalityTrait.description: Keeps emotional distance and rarely engages personally with others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Shy
PersonalityTrait.label: Shy
PersonalityTrait.description: Nervous and reserved around unfamiliar people.

PersonalityTrait.name: Outgoing
PersonalityTrait.label: Outgoing
PersonalityTrait.description: Confident and energetic in social settings.

PersonalityTrait.name: Gregarious
PersonalityTrait.label: Gregarious
PersonalityTrait.description: Thrives in crowds and constantly seeks out new company.

PersonalityTrait.name: Honest
PersonalityTrait.label: Honest
PersonalityTrait.description: Always tells the truth, even when it is inconvenient.

PersonalityTrait.name: Deceptive
PersonalityTrait.label: Deceptive
PersonalityTrait.description: Frequently lies or misleads others to achieve their goals.

PersonalityTrait.name: Trustworthy
PersonalityTrait.label: Trustworthy
PersonalityTrait.description: Reliable and consistent, keeps promises without fail.

PersonalityTrait.name: Manipulative
PersonalityTrait.label: Manipulative
PersonalityTrait.description: Skilled at controlling others through subtle influence.

PersonalityTrait.name: Kind
PersonalityTrait.label: Kind
PersonalityTrait.description: Treats others with warmth, care, and consideration.

PersonalityTrait.name: Cruel
PersonalityTrait.label: Cruel
PersonalityTrait.description: Takes pleasure in causing pain or suffering to others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Generous
PersonalityTrait.label: Generous
PersonalityTrait.description: Freely gives time, resources, or help to those in need.

PersonalityTrait.name: Greedy
PersonalityTrait.label: Greedy
PersonalityTrait.description: Obsessed with acquiring wealth and possessions.

PersonalityTrait.name: Selfish
PersonalityTrait.label: Selfish
PersonalityTrait.description: Prioritizes personal gain over the wellbeing of others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Altruistic
PersonalityTrait.label: Altruistic
PersonalityTrait.description: Selflessly devoted to the welfare of others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Ruthless
PersonalityTrait.label: Ruthless
PersonalityTrait.description: Shows no mercy in pursuit of their goals.

PersonalityTrait.name: Compassionate
PersonalityTrait.label: Compassionate
PersonalityTrait.description: Deeply empathetic toward the suffering of others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Coldhearted
PersonalityTrait.label: Coldhearted
PersonalityTrait.description: Emotionally distant and indifferent to others' pain.

PersonalityTrait.name: Vengeful
PersonalityTrait.label: Vengeful
PersonalityTrait.description: Holds grudges and actively seeks retribution.

PersonalityTrait.name: Forgiving
PersonalityTrait.label: Forgiving
PersonalityTrait.description: Quick to let go of anger and grant second chances.

PersonalityTrait.name: Righteous
PersonalityTrait.label: Righteous
PersonalityTrait.description: Strongly guided by a personal sense of justice and morality.

PersonalityTrait.name: Corrupt
PersonalityTrait.label: Corrupt
PersonalityTrait.description: Willing to abandon principles for personal advantage.

PersonalityTrait.name: Calm
PersonalityTrait.label: Calm
PersonalityTrait.description: Remains composed and level-headed under pressure.

PersonalityTrait.name: Hot-tempered
PersonalityTrait.label: Hot-tempered
PersonalityTrait.description: Quick to anger and prone to emotional outbursts.

PersonalityTrait.name: Cheerful
PersonalityTrait.label: Cheerful
PersonalityTrait.description: Maintains a bright, positive outlook in most situations.

PersonalityTrait.name: Melancholic
PersonalityTrait.label: Melancholic
PersonalityTrait.description: Prone to sadness and reflective, somber moods.

PersonalityTrait.name: Anxious
PersonalityTrait.label: Anxious
PersonalityTrait.description: Easily worried and often expects the worst outcome.

PersonalityTrait.name: Stoic
PersonalityTrait.label: Stoic
PersonalityTrait.description: Suppresses emotion and endures hardship without complaint.

PersonalityTrait.name: Optimistic
PersonalityTrait.label: Optimistic
PersonalityTrait.description: Believes things will generally turn out well.

PersonalityTrait.name: Pessimistic
PersonalityTrait.label: Pessimistic
PersonalityTrait.description: Expects the worst and focuses on potential downsides.

PersonalityTrait.name: Content
PersonalityTrait.label: Content
PersonalityTrait.description: Satisfied with life and rarely seeks more than what they have.

PersonalityTrait.name: Jealous
PersonalityTrait.label: Jealous
PersonalityTrait.description: Easily envious of others' success or possessions.

PersonalityTrait.name: Passionate
PersonalityTrait.label: Passionate
PersonalityTrait.description: Pursues interests and relationships with intense emotion.

PersonalityTrait.name: Apathetic
PersonalityTrait.label: Apathetic
PersonalityTrait.description: Shows little interest or concern about most things.

PersonalityTrait.name: Moody
PersonalityTrait.label: Moody
PersonalityTrait.description: Emotional state shifts quickly and unpredictably.

PersonalityTrait.name: Serene
PersonalityTrait.label: Serene
PersonalityTrait.description: Radiates a deep sense of inner peace and tranquility.

PersonalityTrait.name: Curious
PersonalityTrait.label: Curious
PersonalityTrait.description: Eager to explore, learn, and ask questions about the world.

PersonalityTrait.name: Wise
PersonalityTrait.label: Wise
PersonalityTrait.description: Possesses deep understanding gained through experience.

PersonalityTrait.name: Naive
PersonalityTrait.label: Naive
PersonalityTrait.description: Overly trusting and lacking worldly experience.

PersonalityTrait.name: Cunning
PersonalityTrait.label: Cunning
PersonalityTrait.description: Clever and resourceful, especially in deceiving others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Foolish
PersonalityTrait.label: Foolish
PersonalityTrait.description: Prone to poor judgment and careless decisions.

PersonalityTrait.name: Analytical
PersonalityTrait.label: Analytical
PersonalityTrait.description: Approaches problems through logic and careful reasoning.

PersonalityTrait.name: Perceptive
PersonalityTrait.label: Perceptive
PersonalityTrait.description: Quick to notice details that others might overlook.

PersonalityTrait.name: Absent-minded
PersonalityTrait.label: Absent-minded
PersonalityTrait.description: Frequently forgetful and distracted from surroundings.

PersonalityTrait.name: Studious
PersonalityTrait.label: Studious
PersonalityTrait.description: Devoted to learning and the pursuit of knowledge.

PersonalityTrait.name: Ignorant
PersonalityTrait.label: Ignorant
PersonalityTrait.description: Lacks awareness or knowledge of important matters.

PersonalityTrait.name: Diligent
PersonalityTrait.label: Diligent
PersonalityTrait.description: Works hard and persists steadily toward their goals.

PersonalityTrait.name: Lazy
PersonalityTrait.label: Lazy
PersonalityTrait.description: Avoids effort and prefers the easiest path available.

PersonalityTrait.name: Ambitious
PersonalityTrait.label: Ambitious
PersonalityTrait.description: Driven by a strong desire for success, power, or achievement.

PersonalityTrait.name: Complacent
PersonalityTrait.label: Complacent
PersonalityTrait.description: Satisfied with the status quo and resistant to change.

PersonalityTrait.name: Meticulous
PersonalityTrait.label: Meticulous
PersonalityTrait.description: Pays extremely close attention to detail and precision.

PersonalityTrait.name: Sloppy
PersonalityTrait.label: Sloppy
PersonalityTrait.description: Careless and disorganized in work or habits.

PersonalityTrait.name: Perfectionist
PersonalityTrait.label: Perfectionist
PersonalityTrait.description: Holds extremely high standards and rarely feels satisfied.

PersonalityTrait.name: Disciplined
PersonalityTrait.label: Disciplined
PersonalityTrait.description: Maintains strict self-control and consistent habits.

PersonalityTrait.name: Impulsive
PersonalityTrait.label: Impulsive
PersonalityTrait.description: Acts on sudden urges without considering consequences.

PersonalityTrait.name: Patient
PersonalityTrait.label: Patient
PersonalityTrait.description: Able to wait calmly without frustration.

PersonalityTrait.name: Impatient
PersonalityTrait.label: Impatient
PersonalityTrait.description: Easily frustrated by delays or slow progress.

PersonalityTrait.name: Loyal
PersonalityTrait.label: Loyal
PersonalityTrait.description: Remains devoted and faithful to allies and causes.

PersonalityTrait.name: Treacherous
PersonalityTrait.label: Treacherous
PersonalityTrait.description: Prone to betrayal, even of close allies.

PersonalityTrait.name: Fickle
PersonalityTrait.label: Fickle
PersonalityTrait.description: Frequently changes opinions, loyalties, or affections.

PersonalityTrait.name: Independent
PersonalityTrait.label: Independent
PersonalityTrait.description: Prefers to rely on themselves rather than others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Submissive
PersonalityTrait.label: Submissive
PersonalityTrait.description: Easily yields to the will or authority of others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Commanding
PersonalityTrait.label: Commanding
PersonalityTrait.description: Naturally takes charge and directs others with authority.

PersonalityTrait.name: Rebellious
PersonalityTrait.label: Rebellious
PersonalityTrait.description: Resists authority and established rules on principle.

PersonalityTrait.name: Obedient
PersonalityTrait.label: Obedient
PersonalityTrait.description: Readily follows orders and respects authority.

PersonalityTrait.name: Diplomatic
PersonalityTrait.label: Diplomatic
PersonalityTrait.description: Skilled at resolving conflict and negotiating peacefully.

PersonalityTrait.name: Arrogant
PersonalityTrait.label: Arrogant
PersonalityTrait.description: Overestimates their own abilities and looks down on others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Humble
PersonalityTrait.label: Humble
PersonalityTrait.description: Modest about their own abilities and achievements.

PersonalityTrait.name: Proud
PersonalityTrait.label: Proud
PersonalityTrait.description: Places great importance on personal honor and reputation.

PersonalityTrait.name: Modest
PersonalityTrait.label: Modest
PersonalityTrait.description: Downplays their own accomplishments and avoids attention.

PersonalityTrait.name: Vain
PersonalityTrait.label: Vain
PersonalityTrait.description: Excessively concerned with their own appearance and image.

PersonalityTrait.name: Superstitious
PersonalityTrait.label: Superstitious
PersonalityTrait.description: Believes strongly in omens, luck, and unseen forces.

PersonalityTrait.name: Pragmatic
PersonalityTrait.label: Pragmatic
PersonalityTrait.description: Focuses on practical outcomes rather than ideals.

PersonalityTrait.name: Idealistic
PersonalityTrait.label: Idealistic
PersonalityTrait.description: Strongly guided by principles and a vision of a better world.

PersonalityTrait.name: Cynical
PersonalityTrait.label: Cynical
PersonalityTrait.description: Distrustful of others' motives and skeptical of good intentions.

PersonalityTrait.name: Stubborn
PersonalityTrait.label: Stubborn
PersonalityTrait.description: Refuses to change their mind once it is made up.

PersonalityTrait.name: Flexible
PersonalityTrait.label: Flexible
PersonalityTrait.description: Adapts easily to new situations and changing plans.

PersonalityTrait.name: Paranoid
PersonalityTrait.label: Paranoid
PersonalityTrait.description: Constantly suspicious of hidden threats or betrayal.

PersonalityTrait.name: Trusting
PersonalityTrait.label: Trusting
PersonalityTrait.description: Readily believes in the good intentions of others.

PersonalityTrait.name: Mysterious
PersonalityTrait.label: Mysterious
PersonalityTrait.description: Reveals little about themselves, keeping others guessing.

PersonalityTrait.name: Eccentric
PersonalityTrait.label: Eccentric
PersonalityTrait.description: Behaves in unconventional or unusual ways.

PersonalityTrait.name: Playful
PersonalityTrait.label: Playful
PersonalityTrait.description: Approaches life with humor and a lighthearted spirit.

PersonalityTrait.name: Serious
PersonalityTrait.label: Serious
PersonalityTrait.description: Rarely jokes and treats most matters with gravity.

PersonalityTrait.name: Adventurous
PersonalityTrait.label: Adventurous
PersonalityTrait.description: Seeks out new experiences and unfamiliar places.

PersonalityTrait.name: Homebody
PersonalityTrait.label: Homebody
PersonalityTrait.description: Prefers the comfort and familiarity of home over travel.

PersonalityTrait.name: Materialistic
PersonalityTrait.label: Materialistic
PersonalityTrait.description: Places high value on wealth and possessions.

PersonalityTrait.name: Frugal
PersonalityTrait.label: Frugal
PersonalityTrait.description: Careful and sparing with money and resources.

PersonalityTrait.name: Devout
PersonalityTrait.label: Devout
PersonalityTrait.description: Deeply committed to their faith or beliefs.

PersonalityTrait.name: Protective
PersonalityTrait.label: Protective
PersonalityTrait.description: Strongly driven to shield others from harm.

PersonalityTrait.name: Competitive
PersonalityTrait.label: Competitive
PersonalityTrait.description: Driven to outperform others and win at all costs.
